/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/stalingrad.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/stalingrad.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stalingrad.dir/principal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stalingrad.dir/jogador.cpp.o -o stalingrad  -Wl,-rpath,/home/tinsel/utfpr/tec_prog/stalingrad/libs/SFML-2.5/lib /home/tinsel/utfpr/tec_prog/stalingrad/libs/SFML-2.5/lib/libsfml-graphics-d.so.2.5.0 /home/tinsel/utfpr/tec_prog/stalingrad/libs/SFML-2.5/lib/libsfml-window-d.so.2.5.0 /home/tinsel/utfpr/tec_prog/stalingrad/libs/SFML-2.5/lib/libsfml-system-d.so.2.5.0
